# session opener

## topic

meta 

## short-description

session-result-method-enhancement

## session content

- Keep the method
- Just the naming shall be slightly impüoroved for a more intuitive understanding - just for the human
- One additional concept idea is "session-opener"

### slightly update naming-concept 
- "topic" => "story"
- "case" => "chapter"
- "brief-slug" => "short-description"
- "session" remains "session"
- "archive" remains "archive"
	
### new method element "opener"

It might be useful, if case, the user has prepared thoroughly for a focussed and structured session an wants to start with a structured prompt.

- the user might prepare for a session with a document like this. (again: it's funny: using the method for working on the method.)
- the he places the file as an opener-prompt in the according sub-folder. 
- the user is resonsible to put it in the right place and to name it according to the negotiated naming-scheme
- the ai can read it first and can start working.
- the ai shell make a breif paraphrasing before starting to work. 
- the ai shell ask the user for clarification, if something is unclear
- the name will be for example "session-0002-opener.md"
- the name my contain the "short-description": session-0002-opener-[short-description].md"
- important: the opener is purely optional
- as a suggestion, further openers shall use the structure of this document. might be discussed and optimized for the ai.

### background-information

#### Metaphoric View

this metaphoric is further not relevant for the internal view, the ai has ont the concept
it might be useful for the ai to know this metapher, in case the human confuses the physcial and the metaphroc wording 

- the human will see it a repo as a "book"
- the book is not read beginning to end, but it is a collection of open stories, which from time to time gets referred
- a story has chapters => 
- a chapter has different paragraphs =>

so the catching command "close this case" will be seen as or confused with "???" (but the user shouldnÄt confuse his ai...)

- copilot updated its "own copilot-instructions.md"
- copilot updated the whole ".github\sessoin-results\..." tree according to the new naming-conventions
- copilot updated the old file-names in the 3 existing topic-folders (which will be seen as story-folders after this current session)
- the content of the current file ".github\meta\session-0001-session-process-description.md" will be the base for this new saved session.\
it will contain a human readable description of the updated "session results method" and will be the fist new file in the new folder-naming-scheme

a "description" that describes the improved method. based on the previous artefact "session-0001-session-process-description.md"
